policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-kv-04 - Purge protection for Key Management in Azure Key Vault'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Key+Vault#IncidentremediationKeyVault#drcp-kv-04 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP KeyVault Enable purge protection
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the creating of a key vault when purge protection is not enabled. Malicious deletion of a key vault can lead to permanent data loss. A malicious insider in your organization can potentially delete and purge key vaults. Purge protection protects you from insider attacks by enforcing a mandatory retention period for soft deleted key vaults. No one inside your organization or Microsoft will be able to purge your key vaults during the soft delete retention period.

drcp.name: KeyVaultEnablePurgeProtectionDisabled
drcp.controlDesc: Purge protection for key management in Azure Key Vault

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
